title: Yellow Lily
writer: Lajos Biró, Garrett Graham, Bess Meredyth
actors: Billie Dove, Clive Brook, Gustav von Seyffertitz
plot: Archduke Alexander, a debauchee, falls in love with Judith Peredy, the sister of the doctor of the village near Alexander's hunting lodge. Although Judith loves Alexander, she spurns him because her brother Eugene has warned her off.
